description: CompositionSaffron round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves, laced collar in-seam with a lee badge appliqued onto the inner collar, and splash graphic print on the frontFittingComfortWash care Hand wash cold Wash dark colours separately Use mild detergent Do not bleach Do not wring or tumble dry Flat dry in shade Warm iron Do not iron on print/embellishments If you believe in the harmony of the elements of nature, this saffron t-shirt from lee is perfect for you. The splash graphic print of the sky, land and water merging into each other adds to this tee a stylish edge. Team it with jeans, shorts or skirts and sports shoes for that cool, casual look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirts Height-5.7", Chest-33", Waist-26"
